steps.assistant_text: Applied standard Vec3 reader template from feedback_uso_accessor_template_reuse.md. Prerequisite: scripts/split-fragments.py first split this file (originally 0x88 bundle with 3 functions) into D4 + 144 + 150. The Tri3i raw + 3-pad layout (pad_top[1]/pad_mid[2]/pad_bot[2]) places raw at sp+0x38, tmp at sp+0x24 with 8-byte gaps as needed. Same template matches equivalent Vec3 readers in bootup_uso/game_uso verbatim.

metadata.verification: objdiff report.json shows fuzzy_match_percent 100.0; objdump -M no-aliases byte-identical to expected.
